response.global_summary: The video features a vocal performance of the song "Bakamajime" by VTubers Inugami Korone and Nakiri Ayame, followed by a transition with background music and a final title card.

scenes.description: VTubers Inugami Korone and Nakiri Ayame perform the song "Bakamajime" on a stage with digital screens.
scenes.original_artist: Creepy Nuts × Ayase × 幾田りら
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
くだんない話と
うざったい貴様と
なみなみの日々に
注がれてく
怠いが溢れ出してく
飯がまだ届かない
仕事は片付かない
うだつの上がらない
毎日にため息ばかり
でまたド派手にすっころび
洗い立てのシャツにこぼすコーヒー
前のめりその姿勢だけは褒めて良し
肩落とす並木通り
増えた柄と差し色に
嗚呼 本当嫌んなる毎日だ
やりたくないことやったって
嫌々早起きしたって
その分素敵な何かが
訪れるとかそんなわけでもないのにな
今日もまた頑張っちゃうよな
がむしゃら以外知らないから
不器用で意地っ張りで
馬鹿真面目な僕らに幸あれ
重くなってきた荷物をちょっと置いて立ち止まり
昨日の事なんざ忘れちまえば同じ
浴びるday light羽根伸ばし
それか月夜にこっそりと吐き出してしまえば良い
でもその前にアレとコレの話
その為には先ずはソレを片し
って今は何時？いやその前に
今日もなんだかんだ騒がしい毎度あり
1ヶ月くらい何にも
考えずだらだらしていたいな
ゆっくり休んで遊んで眠っていたいな
って思う日もあるけれど
やっとここまできたんだよ
ここじゃ終われなんだよ
辛いきついもいつかは
笑い話にできると信じてるんだほら
今日もまた頑張っちゃうからさ
がむしゃらに愛を歌うからさ
(目一杯吸い込んだ空気)
嗚呼 本当素晴らしい毎日だ
やりたくないことやったって
嫌々早起きしたって
ほんの少しの幸せに
触れるだけで全部全部ありに思えるんだ
明日もまた頑張ってみようか
がむしゃらに生きていくんだ
不器用で意地っ張りで
馬鹿真面目な僕らに幸あれ
do my thing, do your thing
肩の力を抜いて柔軟に
again, do my thing, do your thing
あと1ミリ背伸び
嗚呼 本当嫌んなっちゃうよな
それでも今を生きている
不器用で意地っ張りで
馬鹿真面目なあなたに幸あれ
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Damn serious
All this nonsense and you
Are getting on my nerves
Ordinary days pass by
Pouring out
Laziness is out there
My food hasn't arrived yet
My work isn't done
I'm sighing day by day
That I'm not getting anywhere
And then I fell down again with a bang
Coffee spilled on my freshly washed shirt
You can praise my posture, always leaning forward
With my shoulders slumped in the tree-lined road
Use new patterns and colors as accents
Ah...
I'm really fed up with days like this
Just because I do things I don't want to
Just because I wake up earlier in the morning
Doesn't mean something wonderful will come to visit
But I keep working hard again today
I don't know anything but to go recklessly
May we who are clumsy, stubborn,
And damn serious be blessed
I put down my heavy luggage and stopped for a moment
It's all the same if you forget about yesterday
Relax and unwind in the light of day
Better let it out quietly in the moonlit night
But before that, we'll have this and that to talk about
First of all, we've got to do it up before we go
What time is it? Nope, before that
It's another noisy day, hey, there you go again
I wanna be lazy for about a month
Without thinking about anything
I wanna take some rest, have fun and sleep
There are days when I wish I could, though
We've finally made it this far
We just can't stop here
All the hard times will be a laughing matter
And that's what I believe
So I keep working hard again today
I'm gonna sing for love with all my heart
Breathing in all the air
Ah...
It's really a wonderful day
Even if I do things I don't want to
Even if I wake up earlier in the morning
Touching a little bit of happiness
Makes me feel like everything's worth it
Give it a try again tomorrow
I'm going to live recklessly
May we who are clumsy, stubborn,
And damn serious be blessed
Do my thing, do your thing
Relax your shoulders and be flexible
(Again) Do my thing, do your thing
Stretch your back a little higher
Oh...
I really hate it
But I'm still alive now
May you who are clumsy, stubborn,
And damn serious be blessed

response.thoughts:
**My Analysis of the VTuber Video**

Okay, here's the task: analyze this VTuber video of two characters singing and dancing. I need to break it down, identify the songs, find the lyrics, and then format it all nicely in JSON. Right, let's get started.

First, I'll watch the video closely. I need to map the scenes, identify the songs and who's performing. Then I'll search for the lyrics. Finally, I'll structure everything according to the `final_result` tool schema.

Let's begin. After watching, the first song runs from 00:00 to approximately 01:53. The subtitles clearly display "ばかまじめ" / "Bakamajime" in the subtitles. The VTubers are Inugami Korone and Nakiri Ayame. By looking at the credits on the screen around 01:54, it appears the original is "Bakamajime" by Creepy Nuts x Ayase x Ikura. I'll verify this shortly.

After "Bakamajime", a transition happens, and the video displays the title card "Longiness". Let's re-examine that. I'll use the search tool to double-check these details.

To confirm and find the lyrics, my search queries will be:

*   "Bakamajime Creepy Nuts Ayase Ikura lyrics"
*   "Bakamajime Creepy Nuts Ayase Ikura lyrics English translation"
*   "Longiness VTuber song lyrics"

I'll start with the first set of searches: `web_search_langsearch_multi(queries=["Bakamajime lyrics Japanese", "Bakamajime lyrics English translation", "Longiness Inugami Korone lyrics"])`.

I'll check the title card and the credits. Alright, I will analyze this information and start searching. The video I'm looking at ends at 05:00. I can confirm, the first song is "Bakamajime". The next bit is a transition. The video ends before any substantial "Longiness" material. It may just be the name of the transition/event in the video, or another title card. I'll search for the credits later.



**JSON Construction for "Bakamajime" Analysis**

Okay, the "Bakamajime" search results are top-notch; both Japanese lyrics and an English translation are readily available, which is exactly what I needed. "Longiness" is the title card at the end, but it's not a performance segment, so I won't include that in my scene list. The vocal performance is exclusively "Bakamajime".

Now, I'm ready to build the JSON. Based on what I've found:

*   Song: "Bakamajime" (ばかまじめ)
*   Original Artists: Creepy Nuts × Ayase × 幾田りら (or Lilas Ikuta) - I'll stick with that standard format for the main artists.
*   Performers: Inugami Korone and Nakiri Ayame.
*   Language: Japanese.
*   Lyrics: Found.

My initial scene breakdown will be:

*   Start: 00:00.000
*   End: 01:53.000
*   Contains vocal music: Yes
*   Song title: ばかまじめ
*   Original Artist: Creepy Nuts × Ayase × 幾田りら
*   Performer: Inugami Korone, Nakiri Ayame
*   Original Language: Japanese

Hold on a moment, let me double-check the credits... Yes, "作詞: R-指定/Ayase 作曲: DJ松永/Ayase". So, Creepy Nuts and Ayase are the main contributors, or Ayase/Ikura. The primary artist name, as per the web search results, should be "Creepy Nuts × Ayase × 幾田りら".

Now I am ready to construct the JSON.

I have to make sure that I adhere to the following constraints:

*   No lyrics truncation.
*   No manual transcription.
*   Only use search results.

Okay, the search results give me the full lyrics in both Japanese and English for "Bakamajime". That covers the "official lyrics ... retrieved EXCLUSIVELY using the web search tool" requirement perfectly.

I'm double-checking the scene breakdown. The entire vocal performance is from 00:00 to 01:53 with "Bakamajime." The rest of the video (01:54 to 05:00) is a transition, outro, and title card. There's no singing there. It's just instrumental.

Is there any other song in the video? I'll re-listen. There's singing from 00:00 to 01:53. Then it transitions to different instrumental music or background music, and finally ends with the title card "Longiness" (04:52 - 05:00). So, "Bakamajime" is the only vocal song.

That all seems correct, the analysis is complete.
